name: Bicisate
description: Bicisate is used as a diagnostic radiopharmaceutical agent for the preparation of Tc99m biscate injection. Biscate forms a stable lipophilic complex with the radioisotope technetium Tc99m that readily crosses the blood brain barrier. Tc99m bicisate is indicated as an adjunct to conventional CT or MRI imaging in the localization of stroke in patients in whom stroke has already been diagnosed. It serves to distinguish between stroke and other brain lesions.
